premium.title: Oddvice Premium
premium.subtitle: Deeper analysis. Better value. Full transparency.
premium.freeText: 1 safe pick per match + a "where to bet" button.
premium.f1: 2 extra deeply-analysed picks per match (value + bold)
premium.f2: Daily accumulator — the best picks combined
premium.f3: Confidence %, suggested stake and full reasoning
premium.active: Demo premium is on — premium picks are unlocked.
premium.note: Billing isn't wired up yet — this demo toggle unlocks premium picks locally so you can preview them.

profile.subtitle: Account and settings.
profile.rgText: Oddvice only provides information and analysis — it does not accept bets and does not guarantee winnings. Only bet what you can afford to lose.
